overall.description: A first-person driving sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling across a futuristic cable-stayed bridge. The vehicle emerges from a covered highway section into bright sunlight, then turns to reveal a flying vehicle hovering over the water alongside modern residential towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway exit ramp with overhead structure

events.description: vehicle exits the shadow of the covered highway structure into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: driving forward through the covered highway section, accelerating onto the bridge

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan overtaking on the left lane

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overhead highway structure casting shadows on the road
overhead gantry with multiple directional signs pointing to different districts
metal cable safety barrier running along the right side of the bridge deck
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels beneath a massive covered highway structure in shadow, with digital billboards and safety barriers visible. Around the 6-second mark, the vehicle emerges from the shadow into bright sunlight as it approaches the open bridge section.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cable-stayed bridge deck with city skyline approach

events.description: camera begins panning right to look away from the road toward the water

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed across the bridge while approaching the city center, traffic flowing smoothly

entered.detail: massive white cable-stayed bridge tower with radiating support cables
cluster of tall glass and steel skyscrapers with distinctive futuristic architecture
calm blue bay water visible through the bridge cables on the right side

segments.scene_description: Driving across the open bridge deck in bright sunlight, with the cable-stayed tower dominating the right side and a futuristic city skyline ahead. The vehicle passes other traffic while the camera remains focused forward until beginning to turn right toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge overlook with waterfront and flying vehicle observation

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while looking out at the water and the hovering aircraft, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering stationary over the water near the shore

entered.detail: dark-colored hovering aircraft floating above the water against the sky
tall modern apartment buildings lining the waterfront shoreline
colorful advertisement posters mounted on the bridge railing

segments.scene_description: The camera has turned fully to the right, focusing on the expansive water view through the bridge cables. A flying vehicle hovers in the distance over the bay, while modern residential towers line the far shore. The vehicle continues moving forward as the camera maintains its gaze on the aerial vehicle and waterfront scenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle travels from a shadowed industrial tunnel into a bright, expansive futuristic cityscape. It begins beneath a massive covered highway structure in deep shadow, passing digital billboards and safety barriers before emerging into blinding sunlight. As the vehicle reaches the open bridge deck, the scene expands to reveal a towering cable-stayed structure on the right and a distant skyline ahead. The camera then shifts its focus, turning away from the road to gaze through the bridge cables toward the open bay. Finally, the view settles on a flying vehicle hovering over the water, framed by modern residential towers lining the far shore.
